text.title: local-llm-ollama Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for local-llm-ollama as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Hardcoding the model name in agent code (e.g., always using "llama3.1:8b").
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Different machines have different VRAM. A hardcoded model that exceeds available VRAM will fail or run on CPU. Model name must be configurable via environment or config file.
